'''tahana''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:joblife|joblife]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joblife|joblife]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| tahana
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæhænæth|tæhænæth]] || [[word:tæhænæj|tæhænæj]] || [[word:tæhænæsh|tæhænæsh]] || [[word:tæhænæ|tæhænæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:tahahanath|tahahanath]] || [[word:tahahanaj|tahahanaj]] || [[word:tahahanash|tahahanash]] || [[word:tahahana|tahahana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tahanath|tahanath]] || [[word:tahanaj|tahanaj]] || [[word:tahanash|tahanash]] || [[word:tahana|tahana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tahafnafth|tahafnafth]] || [[word:tahafnafj|tahafnafj]] || [[word:tahafnafsh|tahafnafsh]] || [[word:tahafnaf|tahafnaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tahanatha|tahanatha]] || [[word:tahanaja|tahanaja]] || [[word:tahanasha|tahanasha]] || [[word:tahanaka|tahanaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tahanath|tahanath]] || [[word:tahanaj|tahanaj]] || [[word:tahanash|tahanash]] || [[word:tahana|tahana]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tahanathal|tahanathal]] || [[word:tahanajal|tahanajal]] || [[word:tahanashal|tahanashal]] || [[word:tahanakal|tahanakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tahanaathatha|tahanaathatha]] || [[word:tahanaajaja|tahanaajaja]] || [[word:tahanaashasha|tahanaashasha]] || [[word:tahanaaka|tahanaaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tahanathan|tahanathan]] || [[word:tahanajan|tahanajan]] || [[word:tahanashan|tahanashan]] || [[word:tahanakan|tahanakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tahanathaoro|tahanathaoro]] || [[word:tahanajaoro|tahanajaoro]] || [[word:tahanashaoro|tahanashaoro]] || [[word:tahanakaoro|tahanakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
